# Helios Engine

> Framework-agnostic programmatic video creation for the web

Helios is a modern engine for creating videos programmatically using standard web technologies—HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Unlike Remotion (React-only), Helios works with any framework or vanilla JS.

## Quick Facts
- **License**: Elastic License 2.0 (free commercial use, no SaaS resale)
- **Status**: Beta / Self-Driving (Core: Stable v5.13.0+, Studio: Alpha v0.107.1+, Player: v0.78.1+, Renderer: v1.78.3+, CLI: Beta v0.45.2+, Infrastructure: v0.25.0+)
- **Frameworks**: React, Vue, Svelte, Solid, vanilla JS
- **Animation**: Standard CSS, Web Animations API (WAAPI), any animation library

## Core API

```typescript
import { Helios } from '@helios-project/core';

// Define strict types for input props (Generic TInputProps) and structure
const helios = new Helios<{ title: string }>({
  duration: 10,  // seconds
  fps: 30,
  width: 1920,
  height: 1080,
  loop: false,
  playbackRate: 1,
  volume: 1,
  muted: false,
  autoSyncAnimations: true, // Auto-sync CSS/WAAPI
  inputProps: { title: "Hello World" }, // Dynamic data via constructor
  captions: [{ id: "1", start: 0, end: 1000, text: "Welcome" }], // SRT string or objects (milliseconds)
  timeline: {
    tracks: [
      {
        id: "main",
        clips: [{ id: "clip1", source: "video.mp4", start: 0, duration: 300 }]
      }
    ]
  }
});

// Reactively subscribe to state changes
helios.subscribe(({ currentFrame, inputProps, availableAudioTracks, activeClips }) => {
  // Drive animations with progress or props
  // availableAudioTracks is AudioTrackMetadata[] (id, src, startTime, duration, fadeInDuration, fadeOutDuration, fadeEasing)
});

// CRITICAL: Ensure fonts, images, and media are ready before rendering
await helios.waitUntilStable();

helios.play();
```

## Packages
- `@helios-project/core` - Headless video engine (state, timeline, subscriptions)
- `@helios-project/player` - Web Component player (`<helios-player>`) and `ClientSideExporter`
- `@helios-project/renderer` - Server-side rendering (Playwright, FFmpeg)
- `@helios-project/studio` - Browser-based development environment (Alpha)
- `@helios-project/cli` - Command-line interface (init, add, components, list, remove, update, build, preview, job, skills, merge, diff, deploy, studio, render)
- `@helios-project/infrastructure` - Distributed rendering orchestration and cloud execution adapters

## Animation Approach
Helios uses native browser APIs, not proprietary hooks:

```css
/* Standard CSS animations work */
@keyframes fadeIn {
  from { opacity: 0; }
  to { opacity: 1; }
}
.element { animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out; }
```
The engine controls `document.timeline.currentTime` to seek animations frame-accurately.

## Architecture
### Rendering Paths
1. **Canvas-to-Video** (MVP): WebCodecs API for Three.js, Pixi.js, WebGL
2. **DOM-to-Video**: Playwright screenshots for HTML/CSS/SVG

### Components
- **Helios class**: Headless state machine (currentFrame, isPlaying, timeline, etc.)
- **Framework adapters**: React hook, Vue composable, Svelte store, Solid signal
- **Web Component**: `<helios-player>` for browser preview and client-side export
- **Renderer**: FFmpeg with piped frames (no temp files) and pluggable RenderExecutor

## vs Remotion
| | Helios | Remotion |
|---|--------|----------|
| Framework | Any | React only |
| Animation | CSS, WAAPI | `interpolate()`, `spring()` |
| Pricing | Free | $100+/mo for 4+ devs |
| Maturity | Beta | Production-ready |
| Distributed rendering | Local (Beta) / Cloud (GCP/AWS/Azure/Cloudflare/Fly.io/Docker/K8s/Modal/Deno Deploy/Vercel/Hetzner/Cloudflare Sandbox) | Available |

## Agent Skills
Skills for AI agents are in `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/`:
- `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/core/SKILL.md` - Core API patterns, state management, subscriptions
- `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/renderer/SKILL.md` - Rendering pipeline usage
- `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/player/SKILL.md` - Player component usage
- `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/studio/SKILL.md` - Studio usage and extensions
- `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/getting-started/SKILL.md` - Initial scaffolding and basic tasks
- `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/workflows/*.md`, `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/examples/*.md` & `.agents/skills/helios-skills/skills/guided/*.md` - Task-specific workflows, examples, and guided skills

## Key Files for Agents
- `README.md` - Vision document
- `docs/BACKLOG.md` - Feature backlog
- `docs/PROGRESS-*.md` - Completed work (per domain)
- `docs/status/[ROLE].md` - Domain-specific status
- `.sys/llmdocs/context-*.md` - Architecture summaries
- `packages/core/src/index.ts` - Core public API
- `packages/player/src/index.ts` - Player public API
- `packages/renderer/src/index.ts` - Renderer public API
- `packages/cli/src/index.ts` - CLI public API
- `packages/infrastructure/src/index.ts` - Infrastructure public API
- `packages/studio/src/server/mcp.ts` - Studio MCP Server
- `packages/studio/src/server/plugin.ts` - Studio Vite Plugin
- `packages/studio/src/server/render-manager.ts` - Studio Render Manager

## Diagnostics
```typescript
const report = await Helios.diagnose();
// {
//   waapi: boolean,
//   webCodecs: boolean,
//   offscreenCanvas: boolean,
//   webgl: boolean,
//   webgl2: boolean,
//   webAudio: boolean,
//   colorGamut: 'srgb' | 'p3' | 'rec2020' | null,
//   videoCodecs: { h264: boolean, vp8: boolean, vp9: boolean, av1: boolean },
//   audioCodecs: { aac: boolean, opus: boolean },
//   videoDecoders: { h264: boolean, vp8: boolean, vp9: boolean, av1: boolean },
//   audioDecoders: { aac: boolean, opus: boolean },
//   userAgent: string
// }
```

## Roadmap
### V1.x (Active)
- **Studio**: v0.107.1+ (Completed: Preview Command, CompositionsPanel Tests, CLI Build Command)
- **CLI**: v0.45.2+ (Completed: CLI Command Coverage Tests V7, CLI Utils Coverage Tests V2)
- **Core**: v5.13.0+ (Completed: Implement WaitUntilStable, Implement Helios.diagnose, Enable Core Testing And Robustness)
- **Player**: v0.78.1+ (Completed: Refactor Player Control Logic, Implement setMediaKeys, Sandbox and Bridge)
- **Renderer**: v1.78.3+ (Completed: Smart Codec Selection Update, CdpTimeDriver Iframe Sync, Smart Audio Fades)
- **Infrastructure**: v0.25.0+ (Completed: CloudRun & Local Worker Adapter Coverage, Modal Adapter, Orchestrator Coverage Expansion)

### AI Integration
- **Studio MCP Server**: Inspect, create, and render compositions via LLM tools (Done)
- **System Prompt**: Programmatic context generation for agents (Done)
- **Helios Assistant**: Context-aware documentation search (Done)

### V2 (Next)
- Advanced audio engine (Tone.js integration)

### V3 (Future)
- Native Node.js encoding (beamcoder)

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/gavinbintz/helios
- Documentation: ./docs/
- Examples: ./examples/
